name: seosanch-cell
description: Cloudflare Pages cell member care manager.

scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/pages --project-name church-cell-manager --branch main
scripts.check: node --check public/app.js && node --check public/auth.js && node --check functions/_webauthn.js && node --check functions/_middleware.js && node --check functions/api/[[path]].js
